tagline: Hosted memory tools for AI agents that need durable context, retrieval boundaries, and audit-ready memory operations.
description: Hosted memory tools for AI agents that need durable context, retrieval boundaries, and audit-ready memory operations.
audience: AI agent teams, MCP operators, and developers adding persistent memory to autonomous workflows
pages: MCP memory server for AI agents
Design a hosted MCP memory server path with token access, scoped retrieval, and clear operational boundaries.
Give agent teams a practical way to evaluate durable context, search recall, retention, and handoff evidence.
Review what needs to be retained, forgotten, exported, and protected before long-running agents depend on memory.
